name: Tank / silo level
description: Top-mounted ranging sensors (ultrasonic or radar) measuring the contents of tanks, silos, bins, and cisterns — grain, feed, water, fuel/diesel, or slurry. Distinct from `groundwater`, which reports hydrostatic water depth above a submerged sensor.
notes: tank.distance is the measured gap from the sensor down to the surface (m), which decreases as the vessel fills; tank.level is the derived fill percentage and tank.volume the contents volume (L) when the device supplies the vessel geometry. A submersible hydrostatic level/pressure probe belongs in `groundwater`, not here.
